This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] AudioWorklet module fetches with a "audioworklet" Request.destination
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "AbortError: Unable to load a worklet's module."
[FAIL] Import declaration with `type: "text"` fetches with a "text" Request.destination
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: "Uncaught TypeError: \\"text\\" is not a valid module type."
Harness: the test ran to completion.
